title: Gemstone Power
body:
Project is still in beta!

Gemstone Power is a tech mod that focuses on processing and automation. This mod adds 18 gems and many metals from which you can craft machines.


Mod adds to minecraft:
  • Energy
  • Machines that will help you process resources
  • Gems that you can harvest from caves and grow them
  • Many metals and their froms for crafting
  • Combat items from gems
  • Custom armor trims
 
Gems
  • Ruby
  • Sapphire
  • Aquamarine
  • Jade
  • Opal
  • Yellow Diamond
  • Amber
  • Topaz
  • Beryllium
  • Bixbit
  • Malachite
  • Onyx
  • Peridot
  • Moon Stone
  • Sun Stone
  • Citrine
  • Dolomite
  • Tanzanite
Metals
  • Iron
  • Gold
  • Copper
  • Aluminum
  • Tin
  • Bronze
  • Silver
  • Electrum
  • Nickel
  • Invar
  • Constantan
  • Platinum
  • Steel
  • Lithium
  • Uranium
  • Lead
  • Zinc
